description: Everything Renovate touches is merged by Renovate itself once the required checks pass, so GitHub's repo-level "Allow auto-merge" setting stays out of the picture. minimumReleaseAge holds a release back for three days: nothing lands unread on the same day it is published.

packageRules.description: Dev tooling is pinned exactly so that every release shows up as a PR. CI fully verifies these: if lint, analyze and the tests pass on all four PHP versions, the bump is good.
Actions are pinned to a digest, so a moved tag cannot slip in between runs.
Runtime constraints are part of the public contract — never widen them automatically.
